title: Template Status Column that adds everywhere when new option is added
excerpt: I would love to have TEMPLATE status columns that can be saved and utilized, so if a new option is added to that status column in one board it is automatically added in all boards that use that template. Mirroring that c…

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have TEMPLATE status columns that can be saved and utilized, so if a new option is added to that status column in one board it is automatically added in all boards that use that template. Mirroring that column doesnt always work for a - formulas and automations, b - not all items are linked to the master, but the same column is used in many places and different boards. Adding an additional item to list and syncing across all our boards would be amazing.
